response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the intro talk by IRyS from 00:00 to 02:11. 2. Identified the song performance 'BE MY FLAME' by IRyS starting at 02:11. 3. Used search query 'BE MY FLAME IRyS official lyrics' to retrieve lyrics. 4. Verified that IRyS is both the performer and original artist, satisfying search rules. 5. Structured the JSON.
response.global_summary: The video features an introduction by the VTuber IRyS, followed by a vocal performance of her original song, 'BE MY FLAME'.

scenes.description: IRyS talks to the camera, introducing her upcoming song 'BE MY FLAME'.
IRyS performs 'BE MY FLAME' live. The song features music composed by Nana Takahashi.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Can't control it anymore, I'm burnin' up red
Crazy thoughts fillin' my head
(Tension rising to the top, won't look back, I'll never stop)
(Blazing, boiling, gettin' hot, it's your fault, baby)
Fever burning up inside, it can't be contained
Got my heart goin' up in flames
Tell me you can feel the searing heat
(Come on and come on, I wanna confess, baby, oh baby, I'm gettin' obsessed)
Are you gonna run away, or burn with me?
(Crank it up, crank it up, hotter and hotter, gonna be, wanna be ready for more)
I'm caught up in a heat wave, I'll never get enough
Fanning the flame of love (and now it's taking over)
Blazin' fire, make me a believer
I'm gettin' dizzy from the smoke in the air
Wild desire, burnin' like a fever
Come hold me close if you dare!
Fire lover, be my flame, keep me burning
Fire lover, call my name, sweet love burn me away
I'm gonna, wanna turn it up, I'm burnin' up, can't get enough
Maybe I'm too hot to touch, it's your fault, baby
I can't hide it anymore, I'm bearing my soul
Let these flames swallow me whole
This is how we're gonna play, a dangerous game
Got your fire runnin' through my veins
Baby, can't you read between the lines?
(Look at me, look at me turnin' to ash, breakin' me, shakin' me, makin' me crash)
Gonna sear it all away until you're mine
(Drivin' me, drivin' me, drivin' me crazy, tellin' me, tellin' me what do you mean)
I'm caught up in a heat wave, I'll never get enough
Fanning the flame of love (and now it's taking over)
Blazin' fire, make me a believer
I'm gettin' dizzy from the smoke in the air
Wild desire, burnin' like a fever
Come hold me close if you dare!
Fire lover, be my flame, keep me burning
Fire lover, call my name, sweet love burn me away
I'm only getting started…
Blazin' fire, show me your illusion
It doesn't matter if it's real or a dream
Wild desire fueling my delusion
I want you burning for me!
Blazin' fire, make me a believer
I'm gettin' dizzy from the smoke in the air
Wild desire, burnin' like a fever
Come hold me close if you dare!
Fire lover, be my flame, keep me burning
Fire lover, call my name, sweet love burn me away
